transcript.text: It's a must to try sea snails when you visit the Eulji-ro area! (Heaps) (And we can't forget about...) That's huge The beer is not here yet (One of the greatest beers of all time) (The never-seen-before beer, Kelly!) (Had to try it even though it's broad daylight) (The one true combo you all must try, beer & sea snails) (The smooth yet strong impression of the beer) I think I'll start drinking in daylight again! (will linger in your heart from now on) Oh jeez Hello again everyone I'm here in the Eulji-ro district today

And you know this place is famous for sea snails So for today, I'll have a sea snail dish (Can't say no to that combo) And I'll have a beer that recently came out to the market (Guess daytime drinking is back on again..) Another daylight drinking I'm excited to try out this new beer So let's get right to it - She said she's a big fan! - Oh, really? (Mini meet-and-greet) Hello (Mini meet-and-greet) Oh my gosh! Were you drinking here? I

did but I didn't...(?) - You're 26!  - Are you?! - I'm 28... - Oh, okay (Just wanted to say she's a big fan...LOL) (And Tzuyang the introvert is feeling all shy) Give me a hug (And Tzuyang the introvert is feeling all shy) Really? I can't believe this is happening! (Done charging up the energy) ('Munchen Hof', Jung-gu, Seoul) (Checking out the hipster area of Eulji-ro) We'll be filming outside today This place has some outdoor seats (The ones that drank but didn't drink(?) LOL) Many people are enjoying their daylight drinks (Found the beer of the day) And I think this is the new beer

(A twist in the taste, Kelly Lager beer) Such a pretty name! Kelly! Sounds like a beer from another country Grown by the sea breeze, 100% Denmark premium malt Double-fermented, sounds fancy! (Oooh, my eyes...) Mr. Son Seok-goo is the model (The man of soft charisma, Son Seok-goo) Feel the strong impression of double-fermented lager They chose the right model...

(Confessing her feelings) What am I even saying?! (He really is the popular guy these days though) (So many people recognized Tzuyang today) My gosh! Thanks for the picture Oh, really? Thank you - (Shy) - You're quite popular in this area And we got our menu like this here (That's really old school) The sea snail menu is here The pork cutlet sounds delicious - I'll have one Eulji-ro sea snail dish - Okay The garlic chicken is great too! (Got thin ears) Oh wait, I wasn't thinking about chicken - I'll get a pork cutlet - Okay

How's the cutlet? - We'll cook it deliciously for you!! - Hehehehehe And a soft tofu stew One rolled omelet (Recommendation taken) And one garlic chicken...heheh (Done ordering) That'll be the order Oh yeah, and a beer too! Kelly (You know your beer) I'll have that one, please (The owner approves the beer) Kelly really is awesome (Got 2 bottles of Kelly!) Then make it 2, please...

(The first thing that comes to mind when hearing Eulji-ro) (Sea snail dish) (And another dish that's familiar but also great) (Rolled omelet) (The pork cutlet is legit drunchies as well) (Pork cutlet) (Recommended by the owner) (Soy sauce/garlic chicken) (The soft tofu stew is ready as well!) (Here are your drunchies) Thank you Enjoy your dish (

Drunchies served...!) Thank you so much (Done setting the table!) Oh, so the sea snails go in like that... (The sea snails are going in right in front of the customers!) (Huge) That's huge (Extra noodles) Mix the noodles after you eat the sea snail The beer hasn't come out yet That's the main menu (

And here it is...!) Wow, the design of the bottle is so pretty (Kelly) Thank you The color of the bottle is...! (Even the color is different...!) It's totally different from the ordinary ones Quite classy! Here, we got a cute.. (Mini Kelly) (The more you look, the more beautiful it is...) That's the opener (Sniff) (Full of expectations) I'm dying to find out its taste The class is pretty too! (

The first glass of Kelly, the lager with a twist in its taste...!) (Full glass) That went well (The ratio looks great...!) The foam ratio looks awesome I'll take a sip right away Oh, the taste is... It's got a really unique taste It just flows in smoothly inside your mouth (Smooth and strong at the same time!) But you can really feel the fizziness down the throat with a clean finish This is great! Whoa, that's really refreshing The color of the bottle...

is amber color (The first attempt in Korea) They're the first to put this color on the bottle, and it looks so pretty Check out the drunchies! Whoa Sea snails! I should start with this one for sure (But that should go in later...lol) Let's get that in Drinking in the daylight is great (Tzuyang changing her drinking habit again) I might start drinking in the daylight again (But the looks of it just calls for drinks) And on the inside we got some jerkies here What could it be? Is it fermented skate? Whoa, sea snails!

You gotta try sea snails if you visit this area...! Check out the size of it! (Supersize) It's delicious The pork cutlet is really pleasing to the eyes That's just amazing (Smooth and strong at the same time, Kelly) It's really smooth when you take a sip, but a strong touch when drinking it down (

It sure has a twist to its taste...!) Let's get another glass Let's get a bite of the omelet! (No need to explain it) That looks great! A sip of broth as well! Whoa, this really is legit (I mean you) (For smooth and strong finish) It says that it's made of 100% Denmark malt (it's gone through double fermentation) with double fermentation It's fermented once at 44°F and once more at 29.

3°F (The perfect balance...) to make it smooth and refreshing at the same time Oh, the chicken! The owner recommended this dish And the smell of the garlic is so pungent! (An eye-opening taste) (Delicioso) That's great A bite of chicken! (And another glass of Kelly!!) Wait, if I eat at this speed (About to be drunk) I might pass out later I should slow down a bit...

I already finished a while bottle... (You can't be drunk already...!) Is this how you open it? Is this the right way? (Pop!) Let's get some drunchies now When you're drinking... You really should eat a lot of drunchies to get less hangover No but, it's still (Got 10 more hours to go until the next day) broad daylight right now I think I saw another huge piece Found it! (Big-sized) The big one And it's so tender What a great combo (

Next up, it's soft tofu stew...!) Let's stir it after you break it (Glance) (Can't help but look...) Since it's smooth and strong at the same time (Son Seok-goo's lager, Kelly) Maybe that's why he's the model (Gazing) I guess you want to drink with him!! Wha?! (It's all written on your face...LOL) What do you even mean? The pork cutlet is great here I'll dig in (

A delicious snack with Kelly...Just wow...) It's great that I got good food and a good beer (But it's a bit cold outside) Should I do some exercise?! (She's starting to go around all over the place...) (Warmed up) A bite of rolled omelet Mmm, it's delicious The rolled omelet is moist and great This place is good And the drunchies just makes a perfect combo for beers! (Gotta get a sip of Kelly!) Oh! That's great (Instead of Coke or plum juice, it's Kelly) I'll make it without sodas today The garlic chicken is great too S

o many people are drinking now...! (But they said they didn't drink though...! LOL) I guess drinking in daylight is a thing (It's so smooth that it's not heavy on the stomach) Sea snails! And I heard... This place is one of the popular restaurants (One of the must-visit restaurants, 'Munchen Hof') I heard all the tables here become full in the evening (

The quality food explains it...) No wonder, all the dish is really great too Everything's so delicious This is great What's great about drinking in daylight is that you can drink more at night after you sober up in the evening (Another round of drinking...) So I think this is great Oh! I didn't realize it was the second bottle...! (Got no choice but to drink you up, Kelly...) And I...

(Big eater Tzuyang now started to exercise) started to work out today I did my first weight training today (And yes, she's working out to eat more lol) So I guess I'll be eating more from now on Don't people eat more when they work out? (Is it just me?) Or not I had to come here to eat because I was so hungry after the workout (

How much more food is she going to eat then...?) I just can't get enough of food (Peek-a-boo) Oh?! Hello there! (Looks like they want to join the table...LOL) They're having Kelly as well!! (You Kelly?) (Yes Kelly) Is it good?! (Let's all try Kelly everyone!!) - I'll have one more bottle of Kelly - Okay lol (One more Kelly plz) Thank you (The new wave of Korean beer, Kelly) Nailed pouring it perfectly This is just (

Really love the color...!) so pretty! It really looks like amber! That was the color, right? (It's the color of the bottle, not the beer itself ma'am...) It's gold color with a hint of red (Glass after another glass...lol) (She's drunk now for sure...!) Rolled omelet Gotta get some drunchies! The pork cutlet really is great (Another glass of Kelly) Oooh, that looks great This is my 3rd bottle but it's so refreshing (

It sure was smooth at first...) When you take a sip, it's so smooth at first But once it goes down (The fizziness!) it's so refreshing It's just perfect! Oh, we got squid in here as well So many ingredients A piece of chicken after a sip A sip of beer after a piece of chicken (No matter what order it is, chicken w/ beer is always right!) That's just great (Ran out of beer again) What? Did I drink all of it again? - I'll get another bottle of Kelly - Coming right up (

Her eyes are losing focus now...) I'm feeling really great right now (One more Kelly) Thank you But this is really cute though (Wishing she could get one) The yellow color makes it so cute, and I love yellow! Hite Jinro (They sure make good beer, no doubt) If they make a new beer, you have to try it, every one of them is great (Cheers) Oooh, that was nice But too much drinking! (Don't overdo yourself) is not good for you But for me, beer is always enjoyable (Beer has just the right percentage of alcohol!) I don't really get drunk from beers It's just perfect! (Almost spilled over)

(I am sober, really LOL) I want to get everything in the bottle (Whatever makes you happy...LOL) There we go Cleared pork cutlet and rolled omelet! I should eat the sea snails in here It's a selfish act to take just the sea snails out of the dish while eating with others... (

She knows her table manners for sure...!) I should save the drumstick for the last - You eat so well! - Thank you! You look so happy! (Thanks for complimenting) Thanks for the great food The sea snail is just so tender I think I finished... Nope, there's one Got one here (Another one!) and another one I want to have a bit more beer but drinking too much isn't healthy So I'll stop here at my 4th bottle (

You sure you didn't drink too much...?) Bottoms up? Let's do that (You really are amazing Tzuyang...) (Done eating) Whoa, so I've tried Kelly, the new beer (Son Seok-goo's lager, Kelly! Lager with smooth and strong taste at the same time) I really enjoyed the smooth and strong finish of the beer (Enjoy cool summer with Kelly!) Summer is just around the corner (Enjoy cool summer with Kelly!) so if you want a nice cold beer Try having Kelly this summer A must-try beer of the year, Kelly! (Slipped) (Failed to look cool) Edit this part out (Warning: Excessive alcohol can cause strokes, dementia) Thanks for another great meal
